name: Code Llama 34B
note: 34B code flagship, no infilling; HumanEval 48.8% pass@1 (Python variant reaches 53.7%).

results.notes: pass@1, base Code Llama 34B (not the Python-specialized variant)

RepoBench v1.1 exact match (EM), averaged across the Python and Java splits reported in Table 17 of the StarCoder2 & The Stack v2 paper (Lozhkov et al., 2024): Python EM 37.22, Java EM 42.35. (Distinct from the Python-specialized 'Code Llama 34B Python' variant, which is not included here.)

Base Code Llama 34B (not Python-specialized variant), GSM8K solve rate, Table 12 ('GSM8k results') / Appendix D 'Math reasoning results' of the official Code Llama paper. Directly confirmed via full-text PDF extraction: row 'Code Llama 34B' = 32.7%. Not previously tracked for this model (existing entries only cover HumanEval, MBPP, RepoBench).

verificationNotes: Confirmed release 2023-08-24 and license. Directly fetched arxiv.org/html/2308.12950v3 Table 2: HumanEval 48.8 / MBPP 55.0 for base Code Llama 34B confirmed exactly. Confirmed 34B does not support FIM infilling (only 7B/13B do), consistent with archDisplay.
